title: RARI Notification 2026 - Walk-in interview for Yoga Therapist Posts
description: The Regional Ayurveda Research Institute (RARI) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Yoga Therapist Post. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Any degree, and Diploma can apply for the RARI Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can attend the walk-in interview. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, selection proces...
